title: Hakea ctenophylla
taxonomy: Hakea ctenophylla is a species of flowering plant in the family Proteaceae. It is a member of the genus Hakea, which consists of shrubs and small trees native to Australia and New Guinea. The family Proteaceae is a group of flowering plants that are mainly found in the Southern Hemisphere, with some species also found in South Africa. Hakea ctenophylla is a rare and poorly known species, and as such, its classification and distribution are not well documented. Further research is needed to fully understand the classification and characteristics of this plant.
